creator: Horizon Canada
description: A $12M Horizon Canada project develops sustainable smart grid technologies across 8 countries. The project generates 287 publications, 43 datasets, 18 software tools, and 124 project documents. The project coordinator needs to: 1) Show the Canadian Commission all outputs annually; 2) Help researchers discover project outputs; 3) Track which outputs have been archived permanently; and 4) Demonstrate project impact.

Funder Impact: The Canadian Commission reviews project impact quarterly by querying the registry. Q3 2024 report shows: "287 total outputs; 142 open access publications; 38 industry partnerships formed; 23 policy briefs adopted." No manual research. This enables evidence-based evaluation of $12M investment.
subject: Smart Grid Technology
Renewable Energy
Urban Sustainability
title: Sustainable Smart Grid Technologies
